messages.content:
Attention Departing Individual:

We regret to inform you that your presence will be greatly missed within our organization. This notification is to formally announce your departure and serve as a reminder to tie up any loose ends before your final day.

We sincerely appreciate the contributions you have made during your tenure here. Your hard work, dedication, and expertise have been invaluable to the success of our team. The impact you have had on both our work environment and the company as a whole will not be forgotten.

As your departure approaches, we kindly request that you take the necessary steps to ensure a smooth transition. This includes documenting any ongoing projects, providing clear instructions for your successors, and organizing your work in a manner that facilitates easy access and understanding for others.

In addition, please arrange a time to meet with your supervisor or a designated HR representative to discuss any final paperwork, return company property, and address any outstanding matters.

We wish you the best in your future endeavors. May you find continued success and fulfillment in your new path. Thank you again for your commitment and service to the organization.

Sincerely,

[Your Name / HR Department]

Dear Departing Individual,

We are reaching out to notify you about your impending departure from our organization. This notice serves as a formal communication to ensure that all necessary tasks are finalized prior to your last day.

We would like to express our sincere appreciation for the valuable contributions you have made during your time here. Your hard work, dedication, and expertise have significantly impacted our team's success. The positive influence you have had on our work environment and the overall company will be remembered.

As your departure date approaches, we kindly request your assistance in making the transition as seamless as possible. This includes documenting any ongoing projects, providing clear instructions for your successors, and organizing your work in a way that facilitates easy understanding for others.

Furthermore, please make arrangements for a meeting with either your supervisor or a designated HR representative. This meeting will address any final paperwork, company property return, and resolution of any pending matters.

We extend our best wishes for your future endeavors. May you find continued success and fulfillment in your new endeavors. Once again, we express our gratitude for your dedication and service to our organization.

Warm regards,

[Your Name / HR Department]
rewrite this sentence: Thank you for your contribution to the Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten (“the School), please note the following before your departure:

Before your departure, we want to express our gratitude for your contribution to the Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten (referred to as "the School"). Please take note of the following information:
rewrite this sentence : All leavers are required to ensure that the above issues have been satisfactorily settled prior to the departure.
Prior to your departure, it is mandatory for all departing individuals to ensure that the aforementioned matters have been satisfactorily resolved.

rewrite: All leavers shall keep the business secrets of the School in confidential and shall not disclose or use any business secrets of the School by himself or through any third person without consent of the School.

All departing individuals are obliged to maintain the confidentiality of the School's business secrets and must refrain from disclosing or utilizing any such confidential information, either individually or through any third party, without the explicit consent of the School.
rewrite: Once authorized please return this form to Human Resources Department.
Please submit this form to the Human Resources Department once you have obtained the necessary authorization.
rewrite: *I Have read and fully understand the above Notice to Leaver. I will uphold a commitment and abide by the terms in this Notice after I leave the School.

I acknowledge that I have thoroughly read and comprehended the aforementioned Notice to Leaver. I hereby pledge to uphold my commitment and adhere to the terms outlined in this notice subsequent to my departure from the School.
rewrite: Signature & date to acknowledge handover
Please provide your signature and the current date below to acknowledge the completion of the handover process.
please rewrite this sentence: Staff will be charged RMB 100 as the flat a cost of uniform, if he/she work less than 1 year at the School and resign due to personal reasons
In case of resignation due to personal reasons before completing one year of service at the School, a flat fee of RMB 100 will be imposed on staff as a uniform cost.
